channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump combined disaster aid announcements with endorsements for GOP candidates
item.description: Trump approved over $846M in disaster relief for Republican-leaning states, pairing the announcements with praise for candidates he endorsed in upcoming elections.

item.title: Peace talks paused as Iran prepares for multi-day funeral of slain supreme leader
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's flag-draped casket was displayed in Tehran on Friday, with millions expected to attend the extended funeral.

item.title: 125 passengers and crew infected with highly contagious stomach virus on cruise
item.description: Health officials reported that over 120 passengers and crew on a Princess Cruises ship contracted a stomach virus during a 20-day trip to Canada.

item.title: Extremely rare copy of Declaration of Independence discovered in UK
item.description: A volunteer at the National Archives in London found the document among papers seized from an American ship in 1776.
